intent: We are not building the Forge Agent architecture. We are building a Mac Consensus Dev Agent that will use consensus AI to develop high quality software. Use all the documents in the local repo to determine the architecture.
scope_statement:
Build the Crafted Dev Agent — a native macOS two-process AI coding agent (Swift shell + Python backend) that uses dual-model consensus AI (Claude + GPT-4o with Claude arbitrating) to autonomously decompose build intents into ordered PRDs and PRs, generate implementation and test code via parallel consensus generation, validate through a multi-stage quality pipeline (self-correction → lint gate → 20-pass fix loop → CI gate), and open GitHub pull requests gated on operator approval. The system encompasses 16 TRD-specified subsystems: macOS Application Shell (Swift/SwiftUI with Touch ID, Keychain, XPC), Consensus Engine, Build Pipeline with confidence-gated scope, Multi-Agent Coordination via GitHub-stored Build Ledger, GitHub Integration Layer, Holistic Code Review (5-lens), TRD Development Workflow (FOUNDER/ENGINEER/CONSULTANT modes), UI/UX Design System, Mac CI Runner, Document Store (FAISS + sentence-transformers), Security Threat Model enforcement, Backend Runtime Startup/Handshake, Recovery and State Management (3-layer persistence, per-PR checkpoints, BuildMemory, BuildRules), Code Quality CI Pipeline, Operational Runbook tooling, and Agent Testing/Validation (FM taxonomy, 35 regression tests).

Clarifications:
  - Same product and Crafted is the product
  - refer to the trds but resolve any ambiguities in the PRDs
  - refer to the trds but resolve any ambiguities in the PRDs and use best practices

Operator on 'This is a full-platform build spanning 16 TRDs, Swift + Pyth':
single build target

Operator on 'The TRDs reference an existing codebase at version 38.153.0 ':
refer to the trds but resolve any ambiguities in the PRDs and use best practices

Operator on 'TRD-8 §24 introduces Figma MCP Server integration and sketch':
refer to the trds but resolve any ambiguities in the PRDs and use best practices

Operator on 'The branch naming convention uses 'forge-agent/build/' prefi':
migrate to crafted/build/

prd_plan.title: Foundation Architecture, Versioning, and Repository Alignment
macOS Swift Shell, App Lifecycle, and Native Runtime Container
Authentication, Keychain, Touch ID, and Session Security
XPC Bridge, Handshake Protocol, and Backend Process Management
Backend Runtime Startup, Compatibility Handshake, and Degraded Operation
Consensus Engine, Dual-Model Generation, and Arbitration
Document Store, Retrieval, Injection Defense, and Build Context Assembly
GitHub Integration Layer, Branch/Commit/PR Lifecycle, and CI Polling
Scope Confidence Gate, PRD Planning, and Ordered Build Decomposition
PR Planning, PR Type Routing, and Execution Contracts
Per-PR Generation Pipeline, Self-Correction, Lint Gate, and Fix Loop
Recovery, Thread State, BuildMemory, BuildRules, and Resume Semantics
Multi-Agent Coordination and GitHub Build Ledger
Code Quality CI Pipeline, Workflow Generation, and Mac Runner Integration
Holistic Code Review Workflow and Five-Lens Review Automation
TRD Development Workflow and Multi-Mode Specification Authoring
Security Threat Model Enforcement and Safe Failure Controls
UI/UX Design System, Design-to-Code Inputs, and Figma Pipeline
Operational Runbook Tooling, Diagnostics, and Operator Controls
Agent Testing, Regression Contract, and Validation Harness
